chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1491 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on exemption application 3. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Petitioner Darya Khan Khoso (Advocate) present in person does not press instant Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with application listed at serial No.2. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
